vulnerabilities.title: Cross-site Scripting in Scratch-Svg-Renderer
vulnerabilities.description: A DOM-based cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Scratch-Svg-Renderer v0.2.0 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via a crafted sb3 file.

vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting in scratch-svg-renderer
vulnerabilities.description: This affects the package scratch-svg-renderer before 0.2.0-prerelease.20201019174008. The loadString function does not escape SVG properly, which can be used to inject arbitrary elements into the DOM via the _transformMeasurements function.
